entry.title: SAP Enable Now Help Topic Pane Colour
entry.content: Hi all, from the development side, would it be possible to change the background colour of the Enable Now pane (grey) to other colours?

entry.title: Re: Group Reporting Rule Based COI - TP calculation
entry.content:
Hi HengyeZhu,

thank you for your help. In the settings tab, we haven't defined any percentage, but we are using Z-COI-PERCENTAGE in the Percentage tab. The selection is defined as in the image.

We have uploaded the percentage using document type 39 (conso unit 7 is the holding).

the period of assignment and first consolidation are the same and it is 012.2021 (first consolidation at end of period).

I would really appreciate your help to solve the issue. Thank you

entry.title: Implementing & Generating password protected PDF payslip
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a requirement to send password protected PDF (payslip) to staff via email. 

We've implemented following notes.

2978586 - How to give password protection to PDF
1743567 - JobProfile Collection
2161051 - Assigning Jobprofile using Jobprofile mapping table

However it is still unclear to me, how, when program calls the FM to generate the PDF, could a unique password specific to employee be generated and inserted into the PDF? How does the configuration described in note fits into the PDF print program development point of view?

Appreciate any advises.

Regards
Foo

entry.title: Re: SAP Customizing Tables (SM30); Allow Wildcard (*) Fie...
entry.content: Those are data dictionary details, that are copied to screen painter, where they can modified further.

entry.title: Re: Demystifying SAP Service Cloud v2 REST APIs: Everything You Need to Know
entry.content:
Hi @yogananda, nice blog 🙂

Regarding metadata in SAP Service Cloud #, is there a possibility to download the JSON structure of each service directly from the system with details of the data type or limits in length? For example, the maximum length of the subject of the case
(Like EDMX from ODATA Service Explorer in C4C v1 or WSDL in communication arrangements for SOAP services)

Regarding the extension with custom fields, is there a possibility to see the metadata structure with the extended fields from the system? Or you have to create an object with the custom field filled in and build the schema from the 'get'?

One last point of interest, if I make a custom field for example on the account, does this field already automatically extend to the Business Partner service and in particular to the Business Partner integration service from S4? Unfortunately it seems to me that this is not the case, but this would greatly limit the possibility of customising the standard integration. You would either have to duplicate the HTTP call for the extended field only, or rebuild a completely custom flow with the account service that has the extended field.

Thank you,

Francesco

entry.title: How to add and use JSON file to mdk project.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
I have created one MDK project using backend services and now i want to add some of the dummy JSON data into Card & Buttons in this existing project. I want to achieve this view kindly give me guidance for this situation.

Thanks and regards
Kushagra Sharma
🍁

#MDK SAP Mobile Services

entry.title: Re: Depreciation Run deletion
entry.content: Thanks for reply ,Unplaaned dep wrongly posted in March-2025 but Accouting entry not posted in GL. how to reverse, Posting period not open (12/2024)

entry.title: Re: Enhancing BW datasources based on ODP_CDS – useful for Datasphere too!
entry.content:
@TuncayKaraca

Hello,

I made some tests.

The extension do not necessarily create joins and it works for with CDC delta (any changes in appended fields is captured).

If The extension comes from an associated view that have different source tables CDC delta do not work.

Example.
1) basic CDS View    Z_MARA as select from MARA.
2) associated View Z_E_MAKT (Z_MARA association to Z_E_MAKT).
3) create an extension Z_EXT_E_MAKT to Z_E_MAKT.
4) create an extension Z_EXT_MARA with the fields from Z_EXT_E_MAKT.

The fields added are correctly in the output of Z_MARA and Datasphere read them.
but the CDC delta trigger only a capture from MARA and not MAKT.
Instead with a left join the CDC delta triggers capture delta from both MARA and MAKT.
(the delta was specified with delta.changeDataCapture.automatic: true).

So the proposed extension process (from billing rows read header information from an association and extend the association) do not work for CDC delta.

entry.title: [ProAxia Connector] How to Prevent the Creation of Unnecessary Activities in SAP ECC
entry.content:
Symptom

An activity is spread across all companies, which leads to an increase in the numbering of the activity code.

Environment

  • SAP Field Service Management
  • FSM Cloud Connector by proaxia

Reproducing the Issue

  1. Log in SAP ECC
  2. Create an "Activity" in SAP EC
  3. Sync the "Activity" to SAP Field Service Management
    Actual
  4. The activity is duplicated for each company in "SAP ECC", each with different codes, but in SAP Field Service Management everything is correct
    Expected
  5. Avoid duplicating activities for each company in "SAP ECC" with different codes

Cause

Configuration missing

Resolution

The suggested solution from ProAxia is to check your assignments customizing.

In /PACG/ECM_PLAS for service calls, ensure that only one company is set as default for the same plant, as mentioned in the documentation provided in "See Also".

Additionally, in /PACG/ECM_SAASG, make sure to add the missing entries for sales organization, distribution channel, and division.

See Also

You can find more information and detailed instructions in the following documentation links:

  • PACG ECM PLAS - Plant Assignment: https://proaxia-prod-doc.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/PFCC/pages/31952576/PACG+ECM+PLAS+-+Plant+Assignment
  • PACG ECM SAASG - Sales Area Assignment: https://proaxia-prod-doc.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/PFCC/pages/31952565/PACG+ECM+SAASG+-+Sales+Area+Assignment

entry.title: issues VF02
entry.content: i am facing this error

entry.title: Re: SERIAL NUMBER IN MATERIAL MASTER:
entry.content: Nice!

entry.title: Re: SAP Customizing Tables (SM30); Allow Wildcard (*) Fie...
entry.content:
Hello @master1980 

That can't be done with foreign key definition only. You'd need to implement a custom check in SM30. See how it is done for instance in the LE-WM view V_T321 for the field LGNUM. It allows *** entry, which of course is not a valid warehouse number:

The foreign key and screen check are defined for V_T321-LGNUM:

However the foreign key check is deactivated in Screen Painter:

That allows to put any value in the LGNUM (warehouse number) field. That is not what we need yet, as we want to validate if the LGNUM value is either a valid warehouse number or *** mask.

Then a check is implemented in the flow logic in V_T321_CHECK module:

PROCESS AFTER INPUT.
 MODULE LISTE_EXIT_COMMAND AT EXIT-COMMAND.
 MODULE LISTE_BEFORE_LOOP.
 LOOP AT EXTRACT.
   MODULE LISTE_INIT_WORKAREA.
   CHAIN.
    FIELD V_T321-LGNUM.
    FIELD V_T321-RBLVS.
    FIELD V_T321-BSLVS.
    FIELD V_T321-KZBEW.
    FIELD V_T321-SOBKZ.
    FIELD V_T321-BSSKZ.
    FIELD V_T321-LGREF.
    FIELD V_T321-BWLVS.
*   field v_t321-bestq.
*   field v_t321-bstqa.
*   field v_t321-bstqe.
    FIELD V_T321-TBFKZ.
    FIELD V_T321-UBFKZ.
    FIELD V_T321-TAFKZ.
    FIELD V_T321-MAILK.
    FIELD V_T321-WEDKZ.
    FIELD V_T321-WENUM.
    FIELD V_T321-KUNWE.
    FIELD V_T321-LFART.
    FIELD V_T321-LIFNR.
    MODULE V_T321_CHECK ON CHAIN-REQUEST.
    MODULE SET_UPDATE_FLAG ON CHAIN-REQUEST.
   ENDCHAIN.
   FIELD VIM_MARKED MODULE LISTE_MARK_CHECKBOX.
   CHAIN.
    FIELD V_T321-LGNUM.
    FIELD V_T321-RBLVS.
    FIELD V_T321-BSLVS.
    FIELD V_T321-KZBEW.
    FIELD V_T321-SOBKZ.
    FIELD V_T321-BSSKZ.
    MODULE LISTE_UPDATE_LISTE.
   ENDCHAIN.
 ENDLOOP.
MODULE V_T321_CHECK.

*........Lagernummer  prüfen ( Tabelle T300 )...........................
  IF NOT V_T321-LGNUM IS INITIAL AND V_T321-LGNUM <> MASK3.
    PERFORM T300_LESEN USING V_T321-LGNUM.
    IF SY-SUBRC NE 0.
      MESSAGE E001 WITH V_T321-LGNUM.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.

I think you can use a similar approach to implement your requirements.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: SAP GEF - Error in upload shapefile
entry.content:
HI,

on SAP GEF the shapefile loading functionality has been enabled in the "Editor" app and the newly loaded shapefile is displayed correctly but when saving the following error message appears

{
"Mistake": {
"code": "'400'",
"message": "Bad Request",
"details": [
"The geometry object key is invalid"
]
}
}

Debugging the PREPARE_EDIT_GEOMETRIES method of the CL_GEF_BL class I saw that the GEF_OBJKEY field for the various rows of the internal table LT_FEATURE_ADD is empty.

Why is the OBJKEY taken from the features coming from the shapefile?
Also I tried adding GEF_OBJKEY and EAMS_OBJNR attributes in the shapefile but they still aren't read.

Does anyone know if any further customizing configuration is required or does the shapefile have to follow a certain standard?

Thank you.

Build ID: 25323

AB version: 2.3.0

entry.title: How can we use a feature that comes with new version, in the old version of the system ?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We cannot use a new feature in the sapui5 library in the project because the customer is using an old version?
Is there a solution to this?

For example, do we have no chance of using the multi barcode reading feature of 1.115 on a system with 1.71? Is the solution to this just an upgrade? Is there a challenging but workaround solution?

I am sharing a note and blog I found about this. The solution seems to be an upgrade, but I wanted to confirm again.

Note 

https://me.sap.com/notes/3360855/E

Blog

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/barcode-scanning-from-sapui5-applications-via-browsers/ba-p/13560133

entry.title: Re: HU and product task for outbound
entry.content:
Hi,

"Since radio data transmission is used, an HU must be specified in the warehouse task. In addition, layout-orientated storage control is used. "

Did you TRY the process with RF? Because then you either pick a HU or you create a pick-HU - and then the system triggers the next step (the second part of the WT) as HU WT and then also LOSC does work.

Brgds

Juergen

entry.title: Re: Enhancing BW datasources based on ODP_CDS – useful for Datasphere too!
entry.content:
@TuncayKaraca

the only way seems to trick change the "delta.changeDataCapture.automatic": true with an explicit definition.

this way for me is working,

( note that ZDWC_E_MARA has a filter on SPRAS = 'E' inside). 

Rows captured from MAKT changes inside ZDWC_E_MARA are only the ones with changed material text in language 'E' ).

The problem persists...
I need to manually manipulate the original CDS View with header annotations and manually add hidden fields.

I believe the problem will persist as associations are on demand joins => ODP side it can not put triggers in every associated tables to capture deltas from potentially unused fields.

So in this case I think I will procede with extension proposed by SAP standards (use the associated views and extend that).

But the final view needs to be a custom one with custom annotations and fiels to guarantee CDC delta correctness.

entry.title: Re: HU and product task for outbound
entry.content: Hello Jürgen, My problem is a little more difficult. I need to set up the full pallet removal or pick if quantity is less than one HU from a storage type. I have experimented until there is no ‘From HU’ in the warehouse task. I have got stuck and am now trying to better understand how the mechanics in EWM work when creating warehouse tasks. I am working with the settings in the storage type, the storage order and the storage task. To be honest, I am looking for a description for ‘dummies’ in which the topic is described. I already have the problems with the customer and am a bit desperate about it.

entry.title: Re: Exploring GraphQL and REST for SAP Developers
entry.content:
consider a scenario where a Fiori application needs to retrieve information about customers and their orders from an SAP backend

There are several variations on this scenario:

1. SAP already offers an OData API that contains both Customer and Order entities. In this case the client simply sends (without the line break for readability)

 

GET /customer/123?$select=id,name,email
                 &$expand=orders(
                   $select=id,date,totalAmount,status
                  )

 

You may notice the structural similarity between the GraphQL query and the OData request - same basic idea, different syntax. And you get exactly the same data back, with only minor variations in the "JSON packaging".

2. SAP offers two separate OData APIs, one for Customer, one for Order.

This variant has several sub-variants:

2a: both Customer and Order reside in S/4HANA: simply build a custom OData service with RAP or key-user tools containing both business objects, and you are back to 1.

2b: Customer and Order reside in different SAP systems: use SAP Graph and build an OData service combining the two entities in a single OData API, and send the same request as in 1. to SAP Graph. Graph will then combine the data from the two SAP systems and make them look as one to the client application, same as what you would do with an off-the-shelf GraphQL proxy.

Building such a combined API with SAP Graph is mostly a point-and-click experience, and we are continuously working on making the configuration experience more smoothly.

What do you get from using SAP Graph? It's an OData API, and the scenario is to build a Fiori app, which is really easy with SAP tools on top of an OData API.

If you prefer to take the rougher road and build a Fiori app on top of a GraphQL API, you still can use SAP Graph as your federation layer because each API is by default served as OData and as GraphQL. After all the two protocols are quite similar to each other, mostly because they solve the same set of problems.

entry.title: Re: How to use a formatter in a value help dialog?

Karishni

entry.title: Transaction zapping in Sybase Replication Server
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Details :

PDS.PDB : ASE1.D30
RDS.RDB:ASE2.D30
SRS : ASE_RS

I tried zapping a transaction from the outbound queue of ASE2.D30 in two scenarios by using sysadmin sqm_zap_tran and they were successful with a message "The number of zapped/unzapped commands is xx" and also "END ZAPPED OR UNZAPPED TRANSACTION DUMP FOR 103:0" from RepServer errorlog. However when I dumped the outbound queue of ASE2.D30, I still see the details of the zapped transaction(secnario1) and the zapped transaction still got replicated to ASE2.D30(scenario2)

Scenario 1:

1. Created a test table Employee and inserted 10 rows(duplicates) with Emp_ID=10 in ASE1.D30 and it replicated successfully to ASE2.D30.
2. Deleted the inserted data (becauase to test the zapping) using a direct delete command (delete from Employee where Emp_Id=10 in ASE1.D30. DSI of the target(ASE2.D30) went down as expected and then I skipped the transaction to resume.
3. Dumped the outbound queue (ASE2.D30) and found the transactions and noted down the lqid to zap.
4. Took the second row using lqid 0:13:1 of the transaction I want to zap and zapped it using "sqm_zap_tran". 

Scenario 2:

1. Suspended DSI for target i.e; ASE2.D30.
2. Inserted a row in Employee table in ASE1.D30.
3. Checked the output of sqm(ASE2.D30) and noticed the data is in the queue as the FirstSeg.Block != LastSeg.Block
4. Dumped the outbound queue of ASE2.D30 and found the transaction.
5. Zapped the transaction using lqid and it was successful. 
6. Resumed the DSI of ASE2.D30.
7. The zapped transaction got replicated to the table in ASE2.D30 successfully.

Here I would like to get clarified on the below and help me to understand the behaviour.

1. How zapping a transaction internal works and how SRS will understand it and proceed with the next transaction in the queue?
2. Zapped transaction(s) won't be removed from the queue?
3. Zapped zransaction will be deleted from the queue only if the entire segment (64 blocks) is full?
4. Why the zapped transaction is replicated to target(w.r.t secnario 2) even though the zapping was successful?
5. RepServer's errorlog showed the zap status. Do we need to get anything other than this?
6. Do we need to do anything after zapping the transaction?

Attached the scenarios output, queue dump(file1,file-2 for scenario1 and the other for scenario2) before and after zapping the transaction.

Regards,
Dilip Voora

entry.title: Re: Updating contract Payment terms
entry.content:
Which kind of PO document are you trying to change (there are different BAPIs)

Value of EKKO-BSTYP is

Lower ValueShort DescriptionTransactionBAPI
ARequest for QuotationME43 
FPurchase OrderME23NBAPI_PO_CHANGE
KContractME33KBAPI_CONTRACT_CHANGE
LScheduling AgreementME33LBAPI_SAG_CHANGE
RRFQ  
OQuotation  
CCentral Contract  
PCentral Purchsae Order  
NCentral Request for Quotation  
TCentral Supplier Quotation

entry.title: Recap of SAP CodeJam and SAP Inside Track Vilnius 2024
entry.content:
A few people from the SAP Latvia Community decided to attend two amazing events in Lithuania: SAP CodeJam and SAP Inside Track.

This blog post is just my personal story about the experience. I started my trip by getting a train to Riga city center to meet my beloved colleagues - @gintsL , @BaibaBlum , and Oleksandr.

@gintsL was our designated driver, and we started our journey to Vilnius. For those who don't know, it is around 330 km from Riga to Vilnius.

There is a beautiful small town next to the Lithuanian border — Bauksa — so we decided to have a nice dinner there to continue our trip. The food was very nice!

Late in the evening, we managed to get to our hotel and went to sleep. On Friday, the next day, the weather was lovely. We had breakfast and headed to the EPAM office to attend SAP CodeJam on ML and HANA, led by @Vitaliy-R. Those who know Witalij know that his presentation style is fantastic. He explains complex stuff as simply as possible. We had nice talks and discussions around GenAI and ChatGTP and explored SAP HANA ML capabilities. 

 

 

 

 

 

In the evening, we had a nice dinner and discussed the upcoming SAP Inside Track, which will happen the next day. After having a nice meal and drinks - we had to explore the old town and visit a few lovely places as per the Untappd app 😉

On Saturday, we had breakfast and went to Accenture Vilnius for SAP Inside Track.

The agenda was packed, and many people from different companies and places attended. Also, I've seen quite a lot of people from Latvia, too!

@justbraz opened the Inside Track with his speech about this event being the first. We thanked our sponsors—SAP, EPAM, Accenture, and SAP Press—and then the event started.

 

 

I enjoyed that the topics differed, from AI to SOLID principles and ABAP Code. As cheery on the top - we had a nice quiz, and the lucky winner got presents from our sponsors.

 

 

 

 

And, of course, we took a few nice joint pictures with all the participants and pictures with colleagues whom I also met for the first time in my life (as we are all working remotely).

 

 

It's nice to see how the small seed of starting SAP CodeJam in Riga back in 2015 grew first to SAP Inside Track Riga and now Vilnius. Someone made a valid point that we need to do the same in Tallinn to unite the SAP community within the Baltic. 🇱🇻 ❤️ 🇱🇹 💛 🇪🇪

After the event, we hit the road back to Riga. It was rather quiet in the car as everyone was super tired after such a productive day!

Those who would like to have a similar experience as I did going from Riga to Vilnius, you have an opportunity to do a Vilnius to Riga trip as we are having our very first SAP Meetup with two topics (TBD) on May 30th. RSVP here - https://community.sap.com/t5/riga-events/sap-community-meetup-riga/ev-p/13680596 

You will receive a link to the photos very soon. We will send a link via email to all of you.

As for now - thanks, everyone, for coming. Without you, it would not be possible!

Were u able to solve this problem?

entry.title: Re: Customize Extended warehouse management monitor (/SCWM/MON)
entry.content:
Hello @Harish_SCM,

Thanks for sharing your experience to customize the Warehouse Management Monitor.

As an alternative, you could consider to work with inheritance in IMG activity Define Monitors. There you could specify that your custom monitor ZRETL shall be based on monitor SAP. By this all nodes and monitor methods will be available for your custom monitor.

Afterwards, you can drill down to Define Node Hierarchy for your custom monitor. There you specify that you do not want to see certain nodes (in your example top level nodes Labor Management and Material Flow System). This would mean adding the following two lines and ticking the checkbox to Hide Node:

  • ROOT C000000017
  • ROOT C000000019

A benefit of this approach would be that your custom monitor would still get updates provided by SAP with the next upgrade - as the custom monitor is still based on monitor SAP.

Best regards, Tobias

entry.title: Trying to understand the behaviour of intent lock in Sybase ASE
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

I would like to seek some clarification about the intent lock type (table level) and it's actual behaviour. Read the manuals available online but I am confused and failing to understand it in full.

1. Intent applies to shared and exclusive table locks and when applied it "locks the entire table". Is this correct?
2. How do we relate intent lock with row-blk? 

Scenario:If a spid is updating a row in a table (DOL) in page 110 (assuming table's data is present in the pages from 50-500).
   
 In the above scenario, an Ex_intent will be applied on the table and there by stopping the spids trying to acquire conflicting row level locks like Sh_intent (for selects) and Ex_intent (for DML) to avoid dirty reads. Is this again correct?

Kindly clarify.

Regards,
Dilip Voora

COMMAND:

npxrnv export -p ios -s standalone_appstore -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.260 -r --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-72867\""

entry.title: Re: HU and product task for outbound
entry.content:
Hi

"I need to set up the full pallet removal or pick if quantity is less than one HU from a storage type. "

OK, that is a strategy question.

But if the system proposes an HU, depends on the stock availability settings and the storage type behavior settings in the storage type.

Still, the system will always create a product WT, even if it proposes an HU.

Brgds

Juergen

entry.title: Re: CDS Analytical Projection Views - the new Analytical Query Model
entry.content:
@AndreaUS: We are developing a Sales analytical CDS View Query. We coded the @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition and @Consumption.filter.multipleSelections for a filter with value help on one of the dimension fields ( E.g. Company Code ). We can see the field coming in the test application of the Analytical List page, but neither the filter value is working nor the value help is coming up.

Are there any restrictions regarding using consumption filters ( other than parameters. I see parameters are working ) in the analytical CDS View Query?

I would appreciate it if any other experts could also help here with the information!

entry.title: Re: HU and product task for outbound
entry.content: Can you recommend a documentary on the subject?

entry.title: Re: Missing source of supply.
entry.content:
Hi,

the shown missing source of supply is for product 29.042.024 at location 2051. There is no location source for that location shown in your screenshot. Please check the supply options at location 2051.

Cheers, Carsten

entry.title: Connection to FTP Server as data file base for assets (pictures)
entry.content:
Dear all,

does anyone from you established a interface between a file server (FTP server) directly to Marketing Cloud or with middleware CPI?

The expected result will be that in content studio the assets from FTP server are available. Is that possible or is this a wish which can never be implemented?

I know about a standard connector for Cellum (CMS system) but we doesn´t want to license a new programm.

Thanks for your answers,

Lukas

Ajaya Kumar L

entry.title: Re: How to create the cds entity Vector column in CAP?
entry.content: both @cap-js/hana and the vector capabilities in CAP are beta only, so you'll have to navigate around the limitations it has for the moment.

entry.title: What's new in SAP Asset Performance Management 2404
entry.content:
Welcome to our latest release blog for SAP Asset Performance Management 2404*. We're excited to share new improvements including improvements to ease rule creation, yet more convergence of strategy and maintenance execution with SAP S/4HANA integration, UI improvements and new analytics data sources for strategy objects. Let's dive in.

*for simplicity I may refer in the following blog to SAP Asset Performance Management as APM. The blog topics are structured by APM business capability.

 

Asset Health Monitoring

Highlight Outliers with Color Coding in App "View Technical Objects (Inspections)" 

In our quest to continually enhance user experience, we’re pleased to introduce color-coded thresholds and icons in the View Technical Objects (Inspections) application based on the underlying indicator configuration. This offers a more intuitive and user-friendly approach to inspecting your technical objects with easy-to-interpret visual color cues that correspond to the configured threshold settings. As such, users don’t just see the value and unit of the measure but can also understand at a glance how these figures stack up against the established indicators. For example, consider a technical object, such as a pressure vessel with a thickness level of 600mm. If this value is within the good range according to the indicator configuration, it will be shown in green. However, if the value dips below the threshold – say to 400mm, which is within the red range – the visual representation will change to red, alerting the user instantly about the need for attention. This new feature is applicable to all indicators with set thresholds.

Additionally, in the table header, instead of just displaying the characteristic or indicator, the position and the indicator category are also shown for user convenience. See the video:

Enhancing Rule Editor Flexibility: From Fixed to Dynamic Values in Notification Output Fields

In the existing rule editor, there's a feature allowing the creation of notifications in SAP S/4HANA as rule outputs. Until now, it was only possible to specify fixed values for the notification output fields Planning Plant, Task List Type, Task List Group, and Task List Group Counter during the design time of a rule.

Now you can dynamically insert values for these fields from class characteristics and attributes assigned to the affected Technical Objects​. This greatly enhances the overall flexibility of the system as it eliminates the need for fixed values for each rule setup. Consequently, if your rules involve multiple Technical Objects that use dissimilar task lists, you're no longer limited to a fixed task list value. Instead, the applicable task list can be dynamically derived based on the particular characteristics and attributes of each Technical Object. This breakthrough ultimately results in a more adaptable and efficient rule design process. You can have much more generic rules and create much less rules.

Asset Reliability Engineering

Converge strategy and execution - recommendation implementation by creating task list

​You can now implement reactive maintenance recommendations as task lists in S/4HANA Maintenance Management from the Implement Recommendations application and view them all in a comprehensive list view. 

Once you've reviewed the recommendations, you can initiate the implementation process by choosing the status 'Implementation in Process.' A 'Create' button has been incorporated for the easy creation of task lists. This newly created task list header, marked as 'Created' in SAP S/4HANA, will conveniently be linked to your chosen recommendation.

The task list in SAP S/4HANA can now be enriched with additional fields (such as Main Work Center, Usage, etc.) and operations as needed. When the task list in SAP S/4HANA is set to Released, you can manually change the recommendation status to Implemented, offering you complete control over the progress of your tasks.

This enables seamless integration between asset strategy and maintenance management, and reliability and maintenance planning. Above all, it provides a clear track of your maintenance work's reliability, keeping you updated on your recommendations' implementation status.

Select and assign technical objects to recommendations from strategy assessment for classes

​Technical objects define, in part, the 'operating context' of a strategy assessment for classes. The process of assigning these technical objects to recommendations is a crucial one, and used to be a time-consuming task, requiring navigating to each recommendation to assign the technical object.

We have therefore introduced a new feature allowing the selection and assignment of multiple technical objects in one go.

Now, instead of assigning technical objects to each recommendation individually, the process is significantly simplified. A user can select multiple recommendations within an ‘operating context’ and assign technical objects to them all at once.

Further enhancing usability, the user can filter the list of technical objects based on different criteria such as class, plan details, profile, and characteristic value. Selection can be made based on the relevancy of the recommendation.

A notable feature is that this bulk assignment of technical objects doesn't override existing assignments. If a recommendation already has some technical objects assigned, the new ones will be added to the list, not replace them.

Deliver APM Strategy Objects as Data Sources for SAC

We've provided three crucial views from the strategy assessment for classes as data sources within our analytics dashboard. This enhancement paves the way for analytics administrators and reliability engineers to:

  1. Generate comprehensive analytics views that reveal strategy assessments for classes and recommendations to the SAC (SAP Analytics Cloud).
  2. Synthesize insightful and meaningful analytics by leveraging these data sources in conjunction with existing data.

This improvement is expected not only to amplify the potential for critical insights but also to enhance customer experience by allowing for the creation of more significant and relevant analytics.

Until now, the dashboard included data sources from FMEA RCM master data, conditionality, and transaction data. Now we introduced data source objects for strategy assessments for classes. We achieved this through available views in the strategy assessment for classes that now include class assessment details like assessment name, class, catalog profile, planning plan detail, source, and assessment ID and status, among others.

We also added the class assessment and assigned failure data class assessment. This improvement integrates failure data codes assigned to any class assistant into a relational table, storing catalog type code, code group, and the order assigned to the assessment ID, in addition to the operating context.

Additionally, the enhancements provide assigned operating context details of an assessment, the context characteristics of each operating context, and corresponding operating context characteristic values.

For the users' convenience, strategy assessments can now be associated with all existing data sources. This feature enables users to conduct their analyses based on the class assessment name and operating context name, further simplifying the user experience.

In this sample dashboard you can observe a distribution of assessments based on their status represented in a pie chart. The chart depicts the percentage of created, released, and in process assessments. Additional drill-down features provide further details such as the assessment and class name associated with a particular assessment and catalog profile. The user is free to customise the columns to best suit their analytical needs.

These improvements not only enhance the analytics dashboard's capabilities but also provide users with a more robust, comprehensive, and user-friendly experience.

 

Keep in touch

Here's a quick reminder how to keep in touch with all things APM:

  • Check out all forthcoming webcasts here. If you register for an IAM webcast, you will be automatically subscribed to our IAM Community Engagement Newsletter. Join us on May 22nd 4pm CET for the 2405 webcast!
  • Watch the replay of our recent webcasts.
  • Subscribe to What's New on the SAP Help Portal
  • Submit or vote for the improvement you would like to see in the SAP Continuous Influence session

See you again soon for the 2405 release update!

entry.title: Re: API_PRODUCT with Internal Number Assignment
entry.content: Any updates on this issue ? Still not possible to import Product Master data with internal number range via API? Kind regards

entry.title: Principle propagation for non SAP sender in PI 7.50 AEX
entry.content:
Hello expert

we have a typical requirement for Java front-end to call ECC backend, REST - PI - ECC. However they require user authorization (Authority Check) in backend based on the user who calls the API. Normally we use ECC service user to call the ABAP proxy from PI, to allow using end user calling ECC from frontend, the only option is Principle propagation.

I've done lots of research on PP, none of them provided definite answer.

From SAP help (https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_scm700_ehp02/7.0.2/en-us/81/6d7e8093134d4f8417a2e780a3393f/frameset.htm), it seems that PP is only possible between SAP systems, as it mentioned you'd need to configure Trusted Relationship between Sender and PI, and between PI and backend, those configuration are SAP specific.

So my question is: is it possible to use PP between non SAP frontend and SAP backend? if yes, how to configure it? (including configuring Trusted Relationship in non-SAP system / application)

thank you so much

Jayson

entry.title: Re: How is creating delivery quantity of scheduling agree...
Re: Non cumulative measure in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi,

I tested it with your example data and it works fine. I only had to adjust the time frame because it is different with your data vs. Screenshots

entry.title: What regular expressions are available to be used in Secondary Mapping Value conversion from SAP-EC
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

We need to replicate data from SAP ERP to Employee Central, but the data quality is quite a mess.

There are national ID from Molga 39 country (Chile) in different formats,

12.123.123-1

12123123-1

1231231231

 

The valid format would be this:

__.___.___-_

(the first one of the three above)

so i am trying to use value conversion this way,

according to the manual it should work

 

 

 

but is showing errors when replicating in se38

 

it is supposed to find the "-" if any and replace it by an <nbsp> space, the same with the points (\.) and after all, applying the correct format __.___.___-_

but it looks like seq number 1 and 2 (replace using patterns with string/ec field) don´t work if together only work if i delete one of them and leave the other. 

Maybe i need just to write everything in the same line and using a regular expressions as if i was writing ABAP code, but regular expressions like this [.-] are not working in this value conversion.

Therefore i would like to know if there are limitations for the regular expressions in this value conversion tool or they should work the same as if i was using ABAP code.

 

Thanks in advance

regards

entry.title: Re: Connect to ABAP environment using RFC
entry.content:
Hi Gustaf, 

I guess it makes sense that you have a look a the tutorial for using JCo in Cloud Foundry with ABAP systems running in SAP's cloud solutions. How to configure destinations is described in the RFC Destinations topic. Also have an eye on the restrictions.

Best regards,
Markus

entry.title: Re: Exploring GraphQL and REST for SAP Developers
entry.content: for Ui5 development, REST API might be a better option than GraphQL, however, if we can consider using  GraphQL for real-time data aggregation for SAP HANA Extended Application Services (XS), SAP Cloud Platform, or even SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP)  GraphQL might be a good alternative my main goal is to highlight the possibilities and advantages to using different APIs with SAP solutions 🤗

entry.title: Re: Exploring GraphQL and REST for SAP Developers
entry.content:
my main goal is to highlight the possibilities and advantages to using different APIs with SAP solutions

Got it, and I like your blog 🙂 

My point is that despite GraphQL's appeal, adding it to your stack isn't for free. You need a "middleware" that provides the GraphQL endpoint and delegates calls to the underlying REST/OData/... APIs, which you need to configure, deploy, and operate, adding to your TCD and TCO.

entry.title: Re: CMS Database - AP_Objects.AP_Filesize

entry.title: Re: CMS Database - AP_Objects.AP_Filesize
entry.content: I mistakenly posted my question on the wrong user community site.  This is a question about a field in APOS Insights database.

entry.title: Re: INT-15852 > Default Port Value Setting in Integration...
entry.content:
Hi,

Integration centre does not support port other than 22 for any new integrations. This is due to security reasons.

HXM Security Governance requires the use of the standard port (SFTP/22) for SFTP type of connection. Using a non-standard port provides no real security protection and is only an example of Security Through Obscurity (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Security_through_obscurity) which has been thoroughly discredited as a viable security strategy.

Having a non-standard port assignment increases HXM's risk (e.g., increased configuration complexity, increased management, etc) and on the other hand does not decrease the risk to the customer. Targeted attacks will mostly start with reconnaissance, part of which any service running on any port will be discovered.

Alternatively, IP whitelisting at customer’s SFTP side and other effective security controls (e.g., anti-brute force mechanisms, multi-factor authentication, etc) adds real security and renders concern of increased attack surface invalid.

Please let us know if you need any further information.

Thank you,

Regards,

Pavana

entry.title: How can I get employee image from SAP C4C odata?
entry.content: How can I get employee image from SAP C4C odata?

entry.title: Tile not showing correct amount and currency
entry.content:
Hi,

Some App tiles are not showing correct ammount and currency, this problem started after a upgrade of version, before upgrade the information were as expected showing amounts and currency BRL.

After entering the App the information are correct, amount and currency expected.

And every other information and values are correct, in portuguese and BRL

Examples of App with problem:

Total Receivables - F1748

Overdue Receivables - F1747

Future Receivables - F1744

The login in to the system is made in Portuguese.

Someone kwons how to fix this or what can we do about it ?

 

Carol

entry.title: Re: How to fetch follow on order in SAP PM
entry.content:
Hi,

You cannot remove the Item, if it is 1:1.

Instead you can set the Maintenance Plan status Inactive and deletion flag set.

Regards

Terence

entry.title: Re: how to show description order in print out

Hi,

Can you share the existing Print layout, you are using ?

In Standard form it will be there, if the print form is customized, then you need modify the program to include the order description

Regards

Terence

Now how do I get the trace into the diagram?

Start transaction SAT -> Evaluate -> Double Click on a measurement; on the next screen press F8

Or is there another way to run this? Please advice.

entry.title: Re: CDS-Views in Datasphere not visible
entry.content:
Hello @madeleine_schaefer 

someone had a similar question like you: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/cds-views-not-visible-in-datasphere/qaq-p/12736904

You can see the CDS View directly, when you connect it via a Replication Flow or a Dataflow.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Forwarding agent as a generic use
entry.content:
Yes. 

It is possible and may be beneficial (depending on Customer requirements) in some cases. 

For example at one of my client, the Forwarder partner is mandatory in Delivery document. The forwarder is determined from a Custom table based on Route, Ship to Party and many other non-standard factors. The Deliveries are created via Background Jobs and some time the Forwarder is not available in Custom Table. 

In such a case we default a Dummy Forwarder to facilitate the Delivery to be created. 

What is the exact question you have for the Dummy Forwarder? 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS Hierarchy Definition - Not able to Preview
entry.content:
Hello @muthuhana 

Have you checked SU53 directly after executing the preview?

Might be there is another CDS view in the underlying views, from which yours is selecting data?

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 mobile app approvals are not showing in List
entry.content: Dear Team, We have checked the solution provided by you, but still the same error. Please arrange for a remote session and guide us to resolve an issue. Regards,

entry.title: Re: SAC - Use a value from another table/datasource in ca...
entry.content:
Hello @axel_ 

I think the easiest way in SAC, if you have an import or even a planning model... is to directly write the required key figure into the same model ... either via file-upload or via data action.

Then you can create calculated key figures and use those.

I would not have any better idea to do it in a SAC story.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements Internal Navigation
entry.content:
Hi,

maybe this documentation can help you: Configuring Internal Navigation - Documentation - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK
But do you know where "keys1" come from ?
Is that defined in the EntitySet Apuracoes?

entry.title: Firebase Cloud Messaging API v1 invalid token handling
entry.content:
It seems that the new implementation of the Firebase Cloud Messaging API v1 is not handling invalid tokens. According to Firebase documentation, if response is UNREGISTERED (error 404), then it means that token is invalid.

https://firebase.google.com/docs/cloud-messaging/manage-tokens

For the legacy API there was a handling implemented in SAP Marketing by checking tokens before sending messages and marking as "invalid" those that Google ID API identified as such.

Now it seems that it does not care and is not making changes to tokens based on a response of the new API v1.

entry.title: Re: Mastering SAP Build Process Automation: Insights from a functional consultant

Informative blog . thanks for sharing on SAP Build Process Automation . 

Regards ,

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP SDK for iOS 10.0 is now available
entry.content:
Hi @AlexGiguere,

The upcoming version 10.0.3 is scheduled for external release in a few weeks (Q2 2024). We are releasing this patch despite the new major version 24.4 because some customers may not be ready to transition to a new major version just yet. This way, customers can still benefit from the minor improvements included in patch releases.

Thank you for the feedback on release notes. We will ensure to update the notes along with our releases from now on.

Thanks, Nick
